tasks.subject: Task 1: Project scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Installable Python package with working `lintwin --help` entry point.

**Files:**
- Create: `pyproject.toml`
- Create: `lintwin/__init__.py`, `lintwin/__main__.py`
- Create: `lintwin/cli/__init__.py`, `lintwin/cli/main.py`
- Create: `lintwin/core/__init__.py`, `lintwin/core/packages/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/conftest.py`, `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pip install -e .` completes without errors
- [ ] `lintwin --help` prints CLI group help text
- [ ] `python -m lintwin --help` also works
- [ ] `pytest` discovers tests directory without errors

**Verify:** `lintwin --help` → prints `Usage: lintwin [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "lintwin/__init__.py", "lintwin/__main__.py", "lintwin/cli/__init__.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py", "lintwin/core/__init__.py", "lintwin/core/packages/__init__.py", "tests/conftest.py", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "lintwin --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pip install -e . succeeds", "lintwin --help shows usage", "python -m lintwin --help works", "pytest discovers tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Constants + Config system
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load/save config.toml (local) and shared.toml (committed) as typed dataclasses; provide track_path/untrack_path helpers.

**Files:**
- Create: `lintwin/core/constants.py`
- Create: `lintwin/core/config.py`
- Create: `tests/test_config.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] LocalConfig and SharedConfig load/save correctly
- [ ] track_path adds to correct list and persists
- [ ] untrack_path removes and returns True/False correctly
- [ ] `pytest tests/test_config.py` passes (8 tests)

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_config.py -v` → all 8 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/constants.py", "lintwin/core/config.py", "tests/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LocalConfig round-trips through TOML", "SharedConfig round-trips through TOML", "track_path adds to correct list", "untrack_path removes and returns True/False"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: track/untrack CLI commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `lintwin track <path> --via git|rsync` and `lintwin untrack <path>`.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_cli_track.py -v` → all 4 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/cli/track.py", "tests/test_cli_track.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_cli_track.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["track --via git adds to git_paths", "track --via rsync adds to rsync_paths", "untrack existing returns success", "untrack unknown exits nonzero"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Snapshot system
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read/write last_sync.json with per-remote timestamps and file metadata.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_snapshot.py -v` → all 4 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/snapshot.py", "tests/test_snapshot.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_snapshot.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Snapshot round-trips through JSON", "load_snapshot returns None for missing file", "build_file_snapshot captures size and mtime"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Git subsystem
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All bare-repo git operations needed by lintwin sync and status.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_git.py -v` → all 5 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/git.py", "tests/test_git.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_git.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init_bare_repo creates HEAD file", "divergence_info correct for in-sync repos", "commit returns False with nothing staged", "commit returns True when changes staged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Dirty repo scanner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk synced paths, find .git directories, detect uncommitted/unpushed state.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_scanner.py -v` → all 4 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/scanner.py", "tests/test_scanner.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_scanner.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["find_git_repos locates .git dirs", "check_dirty returns None for clean repo", "scan_for_dirty_repos filters correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: PackageManager ABC + Arch implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ABC + pacman/AUR/pip/npm implementations; get_available_managers() auto-detects.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_packages.py -v` → all 5 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/packages/base.py", "lintwin/core/packages/arch.py", "tests/test_packages.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_packages.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PacmanManager is subclass of PackageManager", "diff returns missing/extra correctly", "get_available_managers returns list"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Rsync subsystem
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Connectivity check (Tailscale → direct fallback), conflict detection, rsync call builder.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_rsync.py -v` → all 7 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/core/rsync.py", "tests/test_rsync.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_rsync.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check_connectivity uses tailscale when hostname set", "detect_conflicts catches both-modified case", "detect_conflicts ignores one-sided", "_is_binary correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: lintwin init wizard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lintwin init (full wizard) and lintwin init --join (join existing setup).

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_cli_init.py -v` → all 5 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/cli/init.py", "tests/test_cli_init.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_cli_init.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check_prerequisites returns list", "discover_dotfiles excludes noise", "discover_rsync_dirs finds non-hidden dirs", "lintwin init --help works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: lintwin sync command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full sync orchestration: dirty-repo scan → preview → git sync → rsync → snapshot update.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_cli_sync.py -v` → all 4 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/cli/sync.py", "tests/test_cli_sync.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_cli_sync.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--dry-run exits without changes", "dirty repos shown", "unreachable remote warns", "sync --help works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: lintwin status, pull, and diff commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read-only status, pull-only sync, and file-level diff vs remote.

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_cli_status.py -v` → all 4 tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/cli/status.py", "lintwin/cli/pull.py", "lintwin/cli/diff.py", "tests/test_cli_status.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_cli_status.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["status shows machine name", "pull --help works", "diff --help works", "status --help works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: lintwin packages commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lintwin packages export/diff/install subcommands.

**Verify:** `pytest -v` → all tests PASSED

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lintwin/cli/packages.py", "tests/test_cli_packages.py", "lintwin/cli/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["packages export writes JSON files", "packages --help shows subcommands", "full test suite passes"]}
```
